creator: helen.koike@collabora.com
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #3)
hmm, weird, I can see it in the patch:

> rename sysutils/py-google-compute-engine/files/{google_ip_forwarding_daemon.in => google_network_daemon.in} (50%)

Could you please try to re-apply the patch and see if sysutils/py-google-compute-engine/files/google_network_daemon.in is there ?
